documentation.file_docstring: Agent prompt body (may include envelope/history/context). Prefer this for prompt shaping. Should use real newlines (`\n`), not escaped `\\n`.
inline_comments: Recent chat history for context (untrusted user content). Prefer passing this as structured context blocks in the user prompt rather than rendering plaintext envelopes.
Raw message body without structural context (history, sender labels). Legacy alias for CommandBody. Falls back to Body if not set.
Prefer for command detection; RawBody is treated as legacy alias.
Command parsing body. Prefer this over CommandBody/RawBody when set. Should be the "clean" text (no history/sender context).
Root message id for thread reconstruction (used by Feishu for root_id). When a message is part of a thread, this is the id of the first message.
Internal flag: command handling prepared trailing prompt text for ACP dispatch. Used for `/new <prompt>` and `/reset <prompt>` on ACP-bound sessions.
Originating channel for reply routing. When set, replies should be routed back to this provider instead of using lastChannel from the session.
Originating destination for reply routing. The chat/channel/user ID where the reply should be sent.
True when the current turn intentionally requested external delivery to OriginatingChannel/OriginatingTo, rather than inheriting stale session route metadata.
Provider-specific parent conversation id for threaded contexts. For Discord threads, this is the parent channel id.
Messages from hooks to be included in the response. Used for hook confirmation messages like "Session context saved to memory".
Always set by finalizeInboundContext(). Default-deny: missing/undefined becomes false.
Simple {{Placeholder}} interpolation using inbound message context.

functions.name: applyTemplate
functions.doc: Simple {{Placeholder}} interpolation using inbound message context.

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: ui, api, auth, logging
